label: NUT carcinoma
basis: BRD4--NUTM1 is the most common NUT carcinoma fusion; the curated orientation is BRD4 5-prime and NUTM1 3-prime
confirmatory_tests: NUT IHC; fusion confirmation by RNA/DNA NGS or FISH; pathology review
caveat: Direct fusion support is strong but still requires morphology and clinical context before diagnosis or treatment selection

label: NUT carcinoma
basis: BRD3--NUTM1 is a recurrent NUT carcinoma fusion; the curated orientation is BRD3 5-prime and NUTM1 3-prime
confirmatory_tests: NUT IHC; fusion confirmation by RNA/DNA NGS or FISH; pathology review
caveat: Direct fusion support is strong but still requires morphology and clinical context before diagnosis or treatment selection

label: NUT carcinoma
basis: NSD3/WHSC1L1--NUTM1 is a recurrent NUT carcinoma fusion; the curated orientation is NSD3 5-prime and NUTM1 3-prime
confirmatory_tests: NUT IHC; fusion confirmation by RNA/DNA NGS or FISH; pathology review
caveat: Direct fusion support is strong but still requires morphology and clinical context before diagnosis or treatment selection

label: NUT carcinoma
basis: ZNF532--NUTM1 is a reported NUT carcinoma partner; the curated orientation is ZNF532 5-prime and NUTM1 3-prime
confirmatory_tests: NUT IHC; fusion confirmation by RNA/DNA NGS or FISH; pathology review
caveat: Less common NUTM1 partner; confirm with tumor morphology and expert pathology review

label: NUT carcinoma
basis: ZNF592--NUTM1 is a reported NUT carcinoma partner; the curated orientation is ZNF592 5-prime and NUTM1 3-prime
confirmatory_tests: NUT IHC; fusion confirmation by RNA/DNA NGS or FISH; pathology review
caveat: Less common NUTM1 partner; confirm with tumor morphology and expert pathology review

label: CIC::NUTM1 sarcoma-compatible rearrangement
basis: CIC--NUTM1 has been reported in round-cell sarcoma contexts and should not be collapsed to NUT carcinoma
confirmatory_tests: Sarcoma pathology review; CIC-rearranged tumor workup; orthogonal fusion confirmation
caveat: NUTM1 is rearranged but the partner argues against automatically assigning NUT carcinoma

label: YAP1::NUTM1 adnexal/poroid-tumor-compatible rearrangement
basis: YAP1--NUTM1 has been reported outside classic NUT carcinoma contexts, including poroid/adnexal tumors
confirmatory_tests: Dermatopathology review; orthogonal fusion confirmation
caveat: NUTM1 is rearranged but the partner is not specific for NUT carcinoma

label: NUTM1-rearranged neoplasm
basis: A NUTM1 3-prime fusion indicates a NUTM1 rearrangement, but partner identity determines whether NUT carcinoma is the right entity
confirmatory_tests: NUT IHC; full fusion partner review; tumor-site and morphology review
caveat: Catch-all only: not all NUTM1 fusions are NUT carcinoma, and examples include CIC--NUTM1 sarcoma and YAP1--NUTM1 poroid/adnexal tumors

label: Ewing sarcoma
basis: EWSR1--ETS-family fusions are defining drivers of Ewing sarcoma
confirmatory_tests: Ewing pathology review; CD99/NKX2-2 IHC; orthogonal fusion confirmation
caveat: Fusion-positive Ewing can sit outside TCGA SARC; interpret with age, site, morphology, and pathology

label: Synovial sarcoma
basis: SS18--SSX fusions are defining drivers of synovial sarcoma
confirmatory_tests: SS18-SSX fusion confirmation; TLE1/SS18-SSX IHC where appropriate; sarcoma pathology review
caveat: Promotes the synovial sarcoma subtype only when the direct fusion is supplied

label: Desmoplastic small round cell tumor
basis: EWSR1--WT1 is the defining fusion of DSRCT
confirmatory_tests: EWSR1-WT1 fusion confirmation; WT1 C-terminal IHC; sarcoma pathology review
caveat: Use with peritoneal/serosal site and morphology; not inferred from EWSR1 expression alone

label: Fusion-positive alveolar rhabdomyosarcoma
basis: PAX3/7--FOXO1 fusions define fusion-positive alveolar rhabdomyosarcoma in the appropriate myogenic tumor context
confirmatory_tests: FOXO1 fusion testing; myogenic IHC; pediatric/soft-tissue pathology review
caveat: Strong ARMS evidence in a myogenic soft-tissue tumor, but rare sinonasal PAX3--FOXO1 tumors exist; review site and morphology before final subtype assignment

label: PAX3::NCOA1/2 RMS-compatible rearrangement
basis: PAX3--NCOA1/2 has been reported in rhabdomyosarcoma and can preserve PAX3 DNA-binding with coactivator activation domains
confirmatory_tests: FOXO1/PAX3 fusion panel; myogenic IHC; sarcoma pathology review
caveat: Not assigned to fusion-positive ARMS here because non-FOXO1 PAX3 partners can map to different RMS contexts

label: PAX3::MAML3 PAX3-rearranged neoplasm
basis: PAX3--MAML3 is recurrent in biphenotypic sinonasal sarcoma and has also been reported in rare fusion-positive alveolar rhabdomyosarcoma
confirmatory_tests: Sinonasal/sarcoma pathology review; PAX3/MAML3 fusion confirmation; myogenic/neural IHC
caveat: Do not collapse PAX3--MAML3 to ARMS or BSNS from fusion alone; site, methylation class, and morphology are decisive

label: Alveolar soft part sarcoma
basis: ASPSCR1--TFE3 is the canonical fusion in alveolar soft part sarcoma
confirmatory_tests: TFE3 IHC; fusion confirmation; sarcoma pathology review
caveat: TFE3 rearrangements occur in several tumors; partner and morphology matter

label: Dermatofibrosarcoma protuberans
basis: COL1A1--PDGFB is the canonical DFSP fusion and supports imatinib-sensitive biology
confirmatory_tests: COL1A1-PDGFB fusion confirmation; CD34 IHC; dermatopathology review
caveat: Use with skin/soft-tissue morphology; does not replace pathology review

label: Solitary fibrous tumor
basis: NAB2--STAT6 is the defining fusion of solitary fibrous tumor
confirmatory_tests: STAT6 nuclear IHC; fusion confirmation when needed; pathology review
caveat: Promotes SFT from direct fusion evidence; behavior still depends on histologic risk

label: Clear cell sarcoma
basis: EWSR1--ATF1/CREB1 supports clear cell sarcoma rather than melanoma by expression alone
confirmatory_tests: Fusion confirmation; melanocytic marker review; sarcoma pathology review
caveat: Melanocytic expression overlap can confuse RNA-only classifiers; fusion is the key tiebreaker

label: Epithelioid hemangioendothelioma
basis: WWTR1--CAMTA1 is the common defining fusion of epithelioid hemangioendothelioma
confirmatory_tests: CAMTA1 IHC; fusion confirmation; vascular tumor pathology review
caveat: YAP1--TFE3 defines an alternate EHE subset; do not confuse with YAP1--NUTM1

label: Epithelioid hemangioendothelioma
basis: YAP1--TFE3 defines an alternate EHE subset
confirmatory_tests: TFE3/CAMTA1 IHC; fusion confirmation; vascular tumor pathology review
caveat: This rule is specific to YAP1--TFE3 EHE and not a YAP1--NUTM1 rule

label: Low-grade fibromyxoid sarcoma
basis: FUS--CREB3L1/2 fusions are canonical for low-grade fibromyxoid sarcoma
confirmatory_tests: MUC4 IHC; fusion confirmation; sarcoma pathology review
caveat: Late-recurring biology depends on pathology; expression alone is insufficient

label: Extraskeletal myxoid chondrosarcoma
basis: NR4A3 rearranged fusions are defining for extraskeletal myxoid chondrosarcoma
confirmatory_tests: NR4A3 fusion confirmation; sarcoma pathology review
caveat: NR4A3 expression can support but direct fusion is more specific

label: Infantile fibrosarcoma
basis: ETV6--NTRK3 supports infantile fibrosarcoma and predicts TRK inhibitor relevance
confirmatory_tests: NTRK fusion confirmation; pediatric/soft-tissue pathology review
caveat: ETV6--NTRK3 also appears in other entities; age, site, and morphology matter

label: Adenoid cystic carcinoma
basis: MYB/MYBL1--NFIB supports adenoid cystic carcinoma in the right salivary/lacrimal/breast context
confirmatory_tests: MYB/MYBL1 rearrangement testing; MYB IHC; salivary/lacrimal pathology review
caveat: Requires site and morphology; MYB expression alone is not specific

label: Acute promyelocytic leukemia
basis: PML--RARA is defining and treatment-critical for acute promyelocytic leukemia
confirmatory_tests: Urgent hematopathology review; PML-RARA confirmation; coagulopathy assessment
caveat: Therapeutic urgency is high; RNA expression classifier alone is not enough

label: Chronic myeloid leukemia
basis: BCR--ABL1 supports CML or Ph-positive acute leukemia depending on clinical context
confirmatory_tests: BCR-ABL1 assay; hematopathology review; marrow/peripheral blood context
caveat: Does not distinguish CML from Ph-positive acute leukemia without clinical and morphology context
